title: spathiphyllum candolleanum var. schomburgkii
intro: Spathiphyllum candolleanum var. schomburgkii, also known as the Schomburgk's peace lily, is a variant of the Spathiphyllum candolleanum plant, which belongs to the family Arumaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which help to combat various health issues. The health benefits of Spathiphyllum candolleanum var. schomburgkii include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
